title: Mary Ruffer
compiled_truth: Mary Ruffer is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-05-18 to 2001-07-17), Mary Ruffer sent 6 and received 82 emails, totalling 88 interactions.
